body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation about the [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) round — I've had a chance to review the updated deck and I think the revised unit economics are a lot more compelling than what we saw in January. We're still working through our internal process on the climate infra side, but I wanted to flag that there's real appetite here and I don't want us to lose the thread on timing. Do you have a sense of when Halfway is looking to close the syndicate? Also, separately, would love to get your read on the grid-edge AI thesis more broadly — feels like there's a conversation worth having beyond this specific deal. Let me know if you're free for a quick call next week.
